evaluator.analysis: All three agents agree on the decision to HOLD, indicating a consensus based on low volatility and stable moving averages. The News Sentiment Follower prioritizes recent news availability and sentiment scores, while Volatility Averse focuses on historical price movements and standard daily returns. Moral Trader emphasizes low volatility and stable moving averages without referencing news or sentiment. This alignment suggests that all three strategies value stability over external factors.
